owner_operator_stated: Site states Dr. Arielle Wulfsohn is current owner; Dr. Scott Emalfarb purchased the practice in 1994 and is listed as founder/previous owner still practicing there; Dr. Jamie Gorden is an associate.
notes: Vendor hint (Jeffreygauledds.Com) was wrong — that site belongs to a different practice at 1105 W Belmont Ave with a different phone number. Correct site (lvdachicago.com) found via search; street address matches record exactly (1014 W Belmont Ave, Chicago, IL 60657). Site's listed phone (773) 472-6322 differs from the record's (773) 472-5235, but the exact address match alone is sufficient corroboration. No DSO/group affiliation stated; appears independently owned.

owner_operator_stated: Site states Dr. Hilliard Blank founded the practice in 1982 and is the owner; Dr. Cody Lindley is an associate dentist. Neither 'Jinny Kim' nor 'Kim Jinny' — the record's named entity — appears anywhere on the site, despite the address (2859 N. Halsted St. #1, Chicago, IL 60657) and phone ((773) 248-8836) matching the record exactly.
notes: SUCCESSOR/OWNERSHIP CONFLICT: the record's named entity 'Kim Jinny DDS' does not match the practice currently operating at this exact address/phone. The practice at 2859 N Halsted St #1, phone (773) 248-8836 is 'Hilliard Blank, DDS & Associates' (est. 1982; roster = Blank owner + Lindley associate), with no mention of any Kim anywhere on the site. A separate aggregator listing (dentalplans.com) shows a 'Dr. Jinny Kim, DDS' tied to Chicago 60657 but could not be corroborated to this specific address, and her current practice location could not be located. Likely a stale vendor record predating a practice sale, rebrand, or the departure of Dr. Kim.

Vendor hint (Toothbudschicago.Com) was correct — address (2929 N. Southport Avenue, Lakeview office) and phone ((773) 328-8282) match the record exactly. Practice is a multi-doctor pediatric dental group (Tooth Buds Pediatric Dentistry; also has a Forest Park, IL location) with Dhwani Patel among 4 listed dentists; the record's named individual is a specialist practicing pediatric dentistry within a group, not a solo GP. No page states individual ownership roles.

Vendor hint (Lakeviewdentalcenteril.Com) was wrong — that site belongs to a different practice ('Lakeview Dental Center', 2822 N Ashland Ave / Westmont IL). Correct site (oralkaredental.com) found via search; address (3247 N. Ashland Ave, Chicago, IL 60657) and phone ((773) 281-8320) match the record exactly, and the site operates under the same corporate name 'Oral Kare, LTD' as the record. Practice established 1982, includes 1 in-house orthodontist (specialist). Some third-party aggregator listings show additional doctor names not found on the practice's own site — only site-confirmed doctors are included here.

owner_operator_stated: Site states Dr. Scott Overholser (28 years of dentistry experience) is the owner. Akshi Chhabria — the record's named individual — is listed as one of the practice's dentists, not stated as owner.
notes: Vendor hint (Lakeviewdentalarts.Com) was correct — address (3115 N Broadway, Chicago, IL 60657) and phone ((773) 270-5000) match the record exactly. Practice is a 4-dentist group; Dr. Scott Overholser is the stated owner, and Akshi Chhabria is a staff dentist (not stated as owner) within the group.

Vendor hint (Secure-Dental.Com) was wrong — that's an unrelated multi-state group (IA/IL/IN/TN) with no Chicago Ashland Ave location and no address/phone match. Correct site (wrigleyvilledental.com) found via search; address (3256 N. Ashland Ave, Chicago, IL 60657) and phone ((773) 975-6666) match the record exactly. The practice operates under the brand 'Wrigleyville Dental,' a 4-dentist holistic/biological dentistry group; Isabel Llamozas — the record's named individual — is confirmed practicing there both on the group site and her LinkedIn profile ('Isabel Llamozas Otamendi DMD - Wrigleyville Dental'). The record's legal entity name is her own PC (Isabel Llamozas DMD PC), but no explicit individual-ownership statement was found on the group site, so this is treated as no_statement rather than a conflict since the named dentist is actively practicing at the verified address.
